title: From grief support to robot cafes & marriage prospects: How AI is transforming daily life in South Korea
summary_full: South Korea is rapidly integrating AI and robotics into daily life, from recreating deceased loved ones to powering unstaffed businesses. This surge is driven by an aging population and a national strategy to become a global AI leader, with massive investments in chips and robotics. The AI boom is also reshaping careers, making semiconductor engineers highly sought-after and influencing educational choices.
